microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **resilience validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled teams to execute drills without PM intervention.

Shipped Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability in **4 months**, achieving a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects, and establishing a repeatable model for continuous agent-driven validation at scale.

Owned end-to-end execution of **14 cross-org recovery drills** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring precise stakeholder coordination.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39%, increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly demonstrating agentic system design for developer-facing infrastructure use cases.

Acted as strategic advisor to forward-deployed engineering and enterprise customer teams, translating complex technical tradeoffs into clear product decisions that aligned CX, operations, and platform reliability stakeholders across org boundaries.

Defined SDK-style self-service interfaces and partner integration requirements for Databricks and NetApp, enabling **extensible platform adoption** and reducing custom engineering work per new enterprise onboarding by over 40%.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical SDK feature gaps and translating developer needs into prioritized 0→1 bets.

Improved developer experience by implementing metadata standards and migrating docs to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster, more accurate retrieval across technical knowledge bases.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams — a 0→1 platform strategy with enterprise-scale impact.

Mobilized a developer-focused product strategy to reduce launch toil, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact execution paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, allocate engineering resources, and make data-driven roadmap decisions with stakeholder-ready precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating end-to-end execution with engineering and ops teams.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and unblock cross-functional engineering work across a fast-moving robotics platform.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable developer workflow for future platform iterations.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer journey — building a new CRM workflow to manage scoping, proposals, and invoicing for 200+ monthly engagements with measurable conversion impact.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to better match customer intent with service offerings.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering a data-driven roadmap for profitability improvements across high-volume service lines.
